name: chrome-devtools-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for Chrome DevTools — enables AI assistants to interact with Chrome browser via DevTools Protocol

scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build

_personal_notes: Personal fork for learning MCP + CDP integration. Upstream: ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp. TODO: experiment with Network.setRequestInterception for mocking API responses in dev. Added dev:verbose script for easier debugging of CDP events. Added dev:network script to scope debug output to chrome-remote-interface only — less noisy than DEBUG=* when focusing on network events.
